name: Smart Tire Machine 2
description: This next-generation discrete automation asset meticulously constructs 'Green Tires' from multiple layers of uncured rubber components. Its operations are cycle-based, typically completing a tire in about 35-45 seconds, with key physics involving precise tension control and robotic mechanical alignment crucial for achieving optimal tire uniformity and structural integrity. The machine integrates real-time sensor data for adaptive process adjustments.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A/Tire Production Line 2/Smart Tire Machine 2
full_text: Smart Tire Machine 2 - This next-generation discrete automation asset meticulously constructs 'Green Tires' from multiple layers of uncured rubber components. Its operations are cycle-based, typically completing a tire in about 35-45 seconds, with key physics involving precise tension control and robotic mechanical alignment crucial for achieving optimal tire uniformity and structural integrity. The machine integrates real-time sensor data for adaptive process adjustments.

name: Curing Press 3
description: A state-of-the-art parallel processing bank consisting of six individual vulcanization presses operating concurrently. This system acts as the primary bottleneck in the production line, efficiently converting raw 'Green Tires' into durable, finished products through controlled application of high heat and pressure, meticulously shaping the tire and cross-linking the rubber polymers. Each press is monitored for temperature, pressure, and cure time to ensure consistent quality and material properties.

name: Smart Tire Machine 1
description: This high-speed, fully automated discrete assembly asset constructs "green tires" from various uncured rubber components and textile/steel cord plies. It operates on a precise cycle-based process, completing a tire build in approximately 40 seconds. Key physical control aspects include precise tension management for cords and mechanical alignment, which are fundamental to achieving optimal tire uniformity and balance, ultimately impacting vehicle safety and performance. Integrated sensors monitor every stage, feeding data into the factory's IIoT system for predictive maintenance and quality assurance.

Integrated sensors monitor every stage, feeding data into the factory's IIoT system for predictive maintenance and quality assurance.

name: Logistics Hub
description: The central nerve center for material flow within the smart tire factory, managing inbound raw materials, inter-process transport of semi-finished goods, and outbound finished products. This hub orchestrates a fleet of AGVs and utilizes advanced warehouse management systems (WMS) for inventory optimization and just-in-time delivery to production lines. It also oversees packaging, labeling, and staging for shipment, ensuring efficient supply chain integration from raw material receipt to final customer delivery. The system minimizes manual handling and maximizes throughput.
